## Description

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. "Closes #42" or "Part of #15" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / cleanup
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I've tested this locally against a real GitHub Copilot token
- [ ] My code follows the style of the existing codebase
- [ ] I've updated relevant documentation (README, DEPLOYMENT, etc.)
- [ ] I've added my change to CHANGELOG.md under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No tokens, secrets, or personal info are included in the diff
- [ ] `npm run build` passes without errors
- [ ] I've considered the security implications of this change
